description_long: This is a modern four-door police car with a robust, muscular build and a black-and-white color scheme. The vehicle features a reinforced front bumper, side mirrors, and a roof-mounted light bar, which is typical for law enforcement vehicles. The body is primarily white with black accents on the hood, roof, and trunk, and it has dark-tinted windows for privacy and security. The wheels are black and sturdy, suitable for urban and pursuit driving. There are visible antennas on the rear, likely for communication equipment, and the car appears to have some minor wear and dirt, suggesting active use. The rear of the vehicle includes a license plate and additional emergency lighting.
description: A black-and-white four-door police car with a roof light bar, reinforced bumper, and visible antennas, showing signs of active use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reinforced black bumper, black hood, and roof light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door layout, white body panels, black wheels, and roof light bar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black trunk, rear license plate, and rear emergency lights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible door handles, black wheels, and roof light bar.
attribute_emergency_lights: A rectangular roof-mounted light bar is present, primarily white with some yellow elements, positioned centrally on the roof.
attribute_license_plate: A license plate is visible on the rear of the vehicle, mounted centrally on the trunk. It appears to have a white background with some dark text, but specific markings or codes are not clearly legible.
